title: Radonized (Discontinued)
description: This is a mod that adds new sorts of things thats 100% made in MCreator!
body:
# RADONIZED IS PERMANENTLY DISCONTINUED!

# Radonized Reimagined
## This Mod is a Reimagined version of Radonized by ErzeKawek
Features This Mod Offers (And more coming soon):
new Biomes, A Dimension, and Items

### 1.8 and 1.9 Doesn't Include all features Listed Here

### Biomes
- Bluewood Forest (Overworld)
- Nectowood Plains (Overworld)
- Covert Caverns and Forest (The Rune Isles)
- Teak Forest (The Rune Isles)
- Rackwood Shroomforest (Nether)
- Jellyshroom Forest (Nether)

**And More Coming soon**
### Dimensions
- The Rune Isles

**And More Coming soon**
### Items and Foods
- Watersalt
- Jellyshroom Jelly

**And More Coming soon**


This mod works well With Most World Gen Mods! So, You Should Probably try it out!

> And This mod Will be updated to 1.19.4 Forge and 1.20 Fabric Sooner or later
> Fabric Port Coming sooner or later!

[Radonized Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/radonized-reimagined)
